dataset_title: NCSZO GNSS-A WaveGlider Surface Temperature 2024 (HOBO MX2203)

instrument.tau_note: Estimated from cross-correlation with 1-Hz CTD during tank calibration. No response-function correction applied: error at tidal timescale ~0.001 C is 14x smaller than calibration uncertainty.

deployment.pre_water_note: WaveGlider released 2024-09-06T10:10:00Z. HOBO activated on ship at 15:51 UTC; entered water at 2024-09-06T17:22:00Z. First 91 rows are air/deck temperature; lat/lon are NaN (ship position, not WG). Detection: temp > 17.0 C OR |dT/dt| > 0.05 C/min (5-min smoothed).

calibration.facility: ONC Marine Technology Centre, Victoria BC (48.6495 N, 123.4455 W)

position.source: WaveGlider WGMS telemetry (~5-min) linearly interpolated to 1-min
position.nan_reason_1: pre_water rows (91): HOBO on ship, telemetry is WG position not ship position
position.nan_reason_2: final ~19 h: WaveGlider returned to port while HOBO still logging

creators.name: Martin Heesemann
creators.affiliation: Ocean Networks Canada / University of Victoria

creators.name: Jesse Hutchinson
creators.affiliation: Ocean Networks Canada / University of Victoria
